'''竏喩-zh-p-y''' ('''kagazhpeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hobbel|hobbel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-p-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hobbel|hobbel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喩-zh-p-y
|-
! Lemma
| kagazhpeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigazhpeyoko|thigazhpeyoko]] || [[word:jigazhpeyoko|jigazhpeyoko]] || [[word:shigazhpeyoko|shigazhpeyoko]] || [[word:kigazhpeyoko|kigazhpeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugazhpeyoko|thuthugazhpeyoko]] || [[word:jujugazhpeyoko|jujugazhpeyoko]] || [[word:shushugazhpeyoko|shushugazhpeyoko]] || [[word:kukugazhpeyoko|kukugazhpeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
